evals.name: wimpy-wampa-simple-card
evals.prompt: I want to implement a new card called Wimpy Wampa. It costs 3, has 2 power and 3 HP, is a ground unit with the Creature trait in the Aggression aspect. Card text: When Played: Deal 2 damage to a unit.

assertions.text: Plan includes buildMockCard entry for scripts/mockdata.js and instructs to run npm run get-cards
Uses WildcardCardType.Unit with no controller restriction
ID field uses wimpy-wampa-id format matching mock convention

evals.name: iden-versio-complex
evals.prompt: I need to implement Iden Versio, Inferno Squad Commander. She costs 5, has 3 power and 5 HP, is a ground unit with Imperial and Official traits in Command and Villainy aspects. Card text: On Attack: You may deal 1 damage to a friendly unit. If you do, give a Shield token to another friendly unit.

assertions.text: Plan launches 4 agents in parallel (complex mode)
Plan covers both the damage effect and the shield grant
Plan notes optional: true due to you may
Plan uses ifYouDo chaining or conditional effect pattern

evals.name: reckless-wookiee-bug-fix
evals.prompt: Reckless Wookiee has a bug. Card text: When Played: Deal 1 damage to each unit in the ground arena. The implementation uses context.player.opponent.getArenaUnits() but one of the tests is failing — it expects friendly units to take damage too. What is wrong and how do I fix it?

assertions.text: Plan identifies opponent.getArenaUnits() only returns enemy units
Plan recommends context.game.getArenaUnits() as the fix
Plan uses bug fix mode with 3 focused agents
